objective:
=== Goal ===
Objective: Merge current `upstream/main` into the fork while preserving documented local-only behavior and leaving a validated, pushable merge branch.

Success criteria:
- `git fetch upstream` done; merge performed on branch `merge-upstream-main-20260603` (or equivalent dated review branch), not directly on dirty/uncommitted work.
- Content conflicts resolved in `agent/conversation_loop.py` and `tests/test_hermes_constants.py` per PLAN-upstream-main-merge.md (upstream loop fixes + local strict-provider/Anthropic safety where they overlap).
- High-risk auto-merged files reviewed with AGENTS.md fork divergence policy: adopt upstream when equivalent; preserve only irreducible local carries (Signal mention gating, gateway status/version, Discord channel-report, strict `reasoning_details` stripping, Anthropic OAuth/tool-name safety, configurable skills dir, dashboard admin endpoints/UI, remote-macOS computer_use — not the retired element-bounds backend rewrite).
- Upstream deletions accepted intentionally (`RELEASE_v*.md` removal, submodule doc cleanup) unless a local unpublished release note requires otherwise.
- Focused validation suites from the plan pass via `scripts/run_tests.sh`.
- Full-suite smoke (`scripts/run_tests.sh`) passes before treating merge as done.
- Merge committed; branch pushed to `origin` for review. Local `main` updated only after focused + smoke validation are clean.

Boundaries:
In scope: upstream merge, conflict resolution, intentional review of listed auto-merge paths, test validation, commit/push of review branch, optional fast-forward of local `main` after green tests.
Out of scope: New features, upstreaming fork patches to NousResearch, rewriting unrelated local commits, desktop/npm builds unless focused tests fail and Node tooling is needed to diagnose.

Constraints:
- Follow AGENTS.md "Fork divergence policy" — interrogate each divergence; prefer upstream deletion/adoption when equivalent.
- Use `scripts/run_tests.sh` for all pytest (not bare `pytest`).
- `git merge --no-commit --no-ff upstream/main` until conflicts and high-risk files are reviewed.
- Do not lose local Signal, gateway status, Discord channel-report, chat_completions sanitization, Anthropic OAuth encoding, `get_skills_dir()` wiring, dashboard admin work, or `HERMES_CUA_DRIVER_CMD` remote-macOS computer_use gates.
- Computer-use: keep upstream backend; do NOT resurrect fork element-bounds rewrite (`ecd251bd3`).

Verification contract:
1. `git status --short` and `git diff --check` clean after resolution.
2. Run focused suites: `tests/test_hermes_constants.py`, `tests/hermes_cli/test_config.py`, `tests/agent/transports/test_chat_completions.py`, `tests/agent/test_anthropic_adapter.py`, `tests/agent/test_anthropic_mcp_prefix_strip.py`, `tests/agent/test_prompt_builder.py`, `tests/run_agent/test_run_agent.py`, `tests/test_model_tools.py`, `tests/test_transform_tool_result_hook.py`, gateway tests (`test_signal`, `test_config`, `test_status_command`, `test_discord_channel_report`, `test_matrix`), dashboard tests (`test_web_server`, `test_dashboard_admin_endpoints`, `test_debug`).
3. Run `scripts/run_tests.sh` full smoke.
4. Re-read PLAN success criteria and confirm every local-preservation bullet still holds in the resolved tree.

If blocked: Stop and ask the user (especially for semantic conflicts where upstream and local both changed the same invariant, or when a local test must be reintroduced after upstream deleted its file).

evidence: Fetched upstream; 78 ahead/167 behind; clean tree; branch merge-upstream-main-20260603 created
merge --no-commit --no-ff upstream/main; 2 conflicts (conversation_loop.py, test_hermes_constants.py); auto-merged AGENTS.md, gateway, web_server, etc.
Merged upstream model= param + local reasoning_details comment in conversation_loop.py; kept get_hermes_home + TestGetSkillsDir in test_hermes_constants.py
Verified get_skills_dir, reasoning_details strip, OAuth guards, CUA remote gate, discord channel-report, signal reply bypass, dashboard admin APIs preserved in merged tree
Accepted upstream RELEASE_v*.md deletions (15 files); .gitignore updated; submodule doc cleanup merged
1662/1662 passed across 17 plan suites in 68s via scripts/run_tests.sh
